title: Audio
description: PsychoPy Audio/Sound component for audio playback

id.description: Unique identifier for the audio component

sound.description: A sound file (e.g. *.wav, *.mp3) or a number for a tone. Use $ prefix for dynamic sound selection (e.g., $soundFile)

stopWithRoutine.description: Should the sound stop when the Routine ends?

forceEndRoutine.description: Should a response force the end of the Routine?

startTime.description: Start time to play the audio in milliseconds

duration.description: Duration to play the audio in milliseconds. Use -1 for infinite duration (allows ending with key press, but continues indefinitely without key press)
